title: Module Summary: Clinical Examination of Hair and Scalp
description: Condensed module summary: inspection, pattern recognition, density and calibre, scalp clues, pull test and shed versus breakage, photography and grading — from Volume 2 manual Module 5. PDF distributed when released.

title: Module Summary: Trichoscopy
description: Condensed module summary: equipment and technique, normal background, pattern hair loss, shedding and immune-mediated patterns, scarring and biopsy targeting, reporting — from Volume 2 manual Module 6.

title: Module Summary: Investigations and Biopsy Logic
description: Condensed module summary: phenotype-led workup, core labs, hyperandrogenism, biopsy indications and site selection, horizontal versus vertical sections — from Volume 2 manual Module 7.

title: Module Summary: Androgenetic Alopecia in Males
description: Condensed module summary: staging, differential, medical ladder, regenerative adjuncts, surgical candidacy and long-term planning — from Volume 2 manual Module 8.

title: Module Summary: Female Pattern and Hormonal Hair Loss
description: Condensed module summary: phenotypes, endocrine overlap, investigations, reproductive context, treatment framework, adjuncts and surgery caution, communication — from Volume 2 manual Module 9.
